technology.title: China scrambles to close AI security gap as Anthropic, OpenAI pull ahead with new models
technology.summary: While leading US artificial intelligence developers such as Anthropic and OpenAI unveil new models with enhanced cybersecurity capabilities, China is also aggressively scaling up its own AI-driven cyber defence market. Anthropic’s Mythos, launched in April, sparked a rapid global response due to its ability to discover and exploit cybersecurity vulnerabilities with unprecedented speed and efficiency. “Our assessment is that China’s own Mythos will definitely emerge, though currently the overall...

briefing.news_focus: While leading US artificial intelligence developers such as Anthropic and OpenAI unveil new models with enhanced cybersecurity capabilities, China is also aggressively scaling up its own AI-driven cyber defence market. Anthropic’s Mythos, launched in April, sparked a rapid global response due to its ability to discover and exploit cybersecurity vulnerabilities with unprecedented speed and efficiency. “Our assessment is that China’s own Mythos will definitely emerge, though currently the overall...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著美國人工智慧開發商Anthropic和OpenAI推出具備增強網絡安全能力的新模型，中國也在積極擴展其人工智慧驅動的網絡防禦市場。Anthropic於四月推出的Mythos模型因其能以空前的速度和效率發現及利用網絡安全漏洞而引發全球迅速反應。報導指出，中國的Mythos模型也將會出現，儘管目前整體發展仍有待加強。
briefing.background: 在全球人工智慧技術快速發展的背景下，網絡安全已成為各國政府和企業的重中之重。隨著數位化轉型的加速，網絡攻擊的頻率和複雜性也在上升，促使各國加強自身的網絡防禦能力。美國的Anthropic和OpenAI在此領域的創新，特別是在發現和應對安全漏洞方面，對全球市場產生了深遠影響。中國政府也意識到這一趨勢，並積極推動本國的AI技術發展，以提升其網絡安全防護能力，並縮小與美國在該領域的差距。
briefing.analysis: 中國在AI驅動的網絡安全市場的擴展，顯示出其對於提升國家安全的重視。隨著Anthropic和OpenAI的技術進步，中國的競爭壓力加大，促使其加速研發類似的技術。各方利益關係中，美國企業希望保持技術領先地位，而中國則希望通過自主創新來減少對外依賴。未來，中國可能會加大對AI網絡安全技術的投資，並可能出現與美國企業的直接競爭。這一動態將影響全球網絡安全市場的格局，並可能引發各國在技術標準和規範上的競爭。

technology.title: Rubio defends new U.S. sanctions on Cuba, targeting military-run conglomerate GAESA
technology.summary: Established in the 1990s under military control, GAESA was the Cuban Armed Forces' strategic response to the economic collapse that followed the Soviet Union's fall and the tightening of U.S. sanctions in place at the time

briefing.news_focus: Established in the 1990s under military control, GAESA was the Cuban Armed Forces' strategic response to the economic collapse that followed the Soviet Union's fall and the tightening of U.S. sanctions in place at the time
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國參議員馬可·魯比奧（Marco Rubio）為最新針對古巴的制裁辯護，這些制裁專門針對由軍方控制的企業集團GAESA。該集團成立於1990年代，旨在應對蘇聯解體後的經濟崩潰及當時美國制裁的加強，成為古巴武裝部隊的戰略回應。
briefing.background: GAESA（古巴軍事企業集團）是古巴政府在面對經濟挑戰時所成立的主要經濟實體之一。自1990年代以來，該集團在古巴經濟中扮演了重要角色，控制著多個關鍵產業，包括旅遊、建設及零售等。美國對古巴的制裁政策自1960年代以來持續存在，並在不同政權下有所調整。近年來，隨著古巴經濟困境的加劇，美國政府再次加強對古巴的制裁，特別是針對軍方企業，以期削弱其經濟基礎，促進政治變革。
briefing.analysis: 魯比奧的辯護顯示出美國政府對古巴軍方經濟影響力的擔憂，並試圖通過制裁來削弱其對古巴社會的控制。這些制裁可能會對古巴的經濟造成進一步打擊，尤其是在疫情後經濟復甦乏力的背景下。古巴政府可能會將這些制裁視為外部干預，進一步強化其國內的民族主義情緒。此外，這一政策的推動者與反對者之間存在明顯的立場差異，支持者認為制裁能促進民主，而反對者則擔心這會加劇古巴人民的困境，並無助於解決根本問題。

technology.title: Who is Louis Mosley, the man tasked with defending Palantir against its critics?
technology.summary: The company’s UK and Europe boss has become a lightning rod for the British public’s fear of a US tech takeover The hall was packed with rightwing radicals when Louis Mosley heralded a coming revolution. Just as Oliver Cromwell – that “crusader for Christ and liberty” – routed King Charles I’s royalists, “a similar revolution is brewing today”, said the UK and Europe boss of Palantir. Globalism’s “twilight” was upon us, he said in a speech dotted with admiring mentions of the podcaster Joe Rogan and “Elon’s Doge”. It was not a typical peroration for a big UK government contractor with more than £600m in deals with the NHS, the Ministry of Defence and police. But Palantir, the world’s most controversial tech company, is no typical contractor. In recent years it has gained firm footholds across Britain’s public sector while appalling critics with its leadership’s rightwing rhetoric and its work for the US and Israeli militaries and Donald Trump’s ICE immigration crackdown . Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: The company’s UK and Europe boss has become a lightning rod for the British public’s fear of a US tech takeover The hall was packed with rightwing radicals when Louis Mosley heralded a coming revolution. Just as Oliver Cromwell – that “crusader for Christ and liberty” – routed King Charles I’s royalists, “a similar revolution is brewing today”, said the UK and Europe boss of Palantir. Globalism’s “twilight” was upon us, he said in a speech dotted with admiring mentions of the podcaster Joe Rogan and “Elon’s Doge”. It was not a typical peroration for a big UK government contractor with more than £600m in deals with the NHS, the Ministry of Defence and police. But Palantir, the world’s most controversial tech company, is no typical contractor. In recent years it has gained firm footholds across Britain’s public sector while appalling critics with its leadership’s rightwing rhetoric and its work for the US and Israeli militaries and Donald Trump’s ICE immigration crackdown . Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 路易斯·莫斯利（Louis Mosley）被任命為Palantir在英國及歐洲的負責人，面對公眾對美國科技公司接管的擔憂。他在一次演講中提到，當前正醞釀一場類似於奧利弗·克倫威爾（Oliver Cromwell）時代的革命，並提及了右派媒體人物喬·羅根（Joe Rogan）及埃隆·馬斯克（Elon Musk）的狗狗幣（Doge）。Palantir作為一家爭議性科技公司，與英國公共部門的合作關係引發了不少批評，尤其是其與美國及以色列軍方的合作背景。
briefing.background: Palantir是一家專注於數據分析的科技公司，近年來在英國公共部門獲得了超過6億英鎊的合同，包括與國民健康服務（NHS）、國防部及警察的合作。該公司因其與美國軍方及特朗普政府的移民執法機構（ICE）的合作而受到批評，這使得其在英國的業務運作面臨公眾的質疑與反對聲浪。隨著全球對科技公司影響力的關注加劇，Palantir的右派領導言論及其業務模式引發了更大的爭議，尤其是在當前政治環境中。
briefing.analysis: 路易斯·莫斯利的任命反映了Palantir在英國市場的戰略意圖，試圖通過強調其對抗全球主義的立場來贏得支持。然而，這種右派言論可能會進一步激化公眾對其的反感，特別是在英國社會中對美國科技公司影響力的敏感性上。Palantir的支持者可能認為其數據分析能力能為公共安全及效率帶來提升，但反對者則擔心其技術可能被用於監控及侵犯隱私。隨著Palantir在英國的影響力增強，未來可能會面臨更多的監管挑戰及公眾反對，尤其是在涉及數據隱私及倫理問題的討論中。

politics.title: US-Iran ceasefire tested near Qatar as Trump awaits ceasefire response
politics.summary: A cargo ship caught fire on Sunday after being hit by an unknown projectile off Qatar’s coast, the British military said, in the latest attack on vessels in the Persian Gulf since a shaky ceasefire stopped fighting between the US and Iran. The Trump administration says the month-old ceasefire remains in effect, but it has been repeatedly tested with Iran restricting traffic through the Strait of Hormuz and the US imposing a blockade of Iranian ports. Washington has been awaiting Iran’s response...

briefing.news_focus: A cargo ship caught fire on Sunday after being hit by an unknown projectile off Qatar’s coast, the British military said, in the latest attack on vessels in the Persian Gulf since a shaky ceasefire stopped fighting between the US and Iran. The Trump administration says the month-old ceasefire remains in effect, but it has been repeatedly tested with Iran restricting traffic through the Strait of Hormuz and the US imposing a blockade of Iranian ports. Washington has been awaiting Iran’s response...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 在卡塔爾沿岸，一艘貨船於週日因遭到不明飛行物擊中而起火，這是自美伊之間脆弱的停火協議以來，波斯灣內船隻遭攻擊的最新事件。儘管特朗普政府聲稱停火協議仍然有效，但該協議已多次受到考驗，因為伊朗限制霍爾木茲海的交通，而美國則對伊朗港口實施封鎖。華盛頓目前正等待伊朗的回應。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗之間的緊張關係在過去幾年中持續升級，尤其是在特朗普政府對伊朗實施制裁後。儘管雙方在一個月前達成了停火協議，但該協議的脆弱性在於雙方的行動仍然相互挑釁。伊朗對霍爾木茲海的交通限制，及美國對伊朗港口的封鎖，顯示出雙方在維持停火的同時，仍在進行戰略上的角力。這一背景使得近期的攻擊事件更加引人關注。
briefing.analysis: 此次貨船起火事件再次突顯了美伊之間的緊張局勢。特朗普政府強調停火協議仍在生效，但隨著伊朗對交通的限制及美國的封鎖行動，雙方的信任基礎已經受到侵蝕。參考報導指出，伊朗正在以自己的步調審查美方的提議，這表明伊朗在回應美國的壓力時可能會採取更加謹慎的態度。各方對於停火的解讀和期待存在差異，特別是美國官員對伊朗的回應持有較高期望，而伊朗則可能會選擇延遲回應，以便在談判中獲得更有利的條件。這種情況可能導致局勢進一步升級，特別是在雙方都未能有效降低敵對行為的情況下。

supporting_titles: Iran-Israel war updates: Iran reviewing U.S. proposal at ‘own pace’ as Trump awaits response, says report
supporting_summaries: The report said expectations had grown that Tehran would issue a response after U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio indicated that Washington was expecting an answer from Iran

politics.title: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards threaten US sites in Middle East if tankers come under fire
politics.summary: Revolutionary Guards issue warning as Trump awaits Iran’s response to Washington’s latest proposal for peace deal Iran’s Revolutionary Guards have threatened to target US sites in the Middle East if its tankers come under fire, Iranian media reported on Saturday, as Washington was left waiting for Tehran’s response to its latest negotiating position. “Any attack on Iranian tankers and commercial vessels will result in a heavy attack on one of the American centres in the region and enemy ships,” the force said, a day after US strikes on two Iranian tankers in the Gulf of Oman. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Revolutionary Guards issue warning as Trump awaits Iran’s response to Washington’s latest proposal for peace deal Iran’s Revolutionary Guards have threatened to target US sites in the Middle East if its tankers come under fire, Iranian media reported on Saturday, as Washington was left waiting for Tehran’s response to its latest negotiating position. “Any attack on Iranian tankers and commercial vessels will result in a heavy attack on one of the American centres in the region and enemy ships,” the force said, a day after US strikes on two Iranian tankers in the Gulf of Oman. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗革命衛隊對美國在中東的軍事基地發出威脅，表示如果伊朗的油輪受到攻擊，將對美國的設施和敵方船隻進行報復。此警告是在美國對兩艘伊朗油輪進行空襲後發出的，正值特朗普政府等待伊朗對最新和平提議的回應。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗之間的緊張局勢持續升級，特別是在海灣地區的油輪安全問題上。美國近期對伊朗油輪的攻擊引發了伊朗的強烈反應，革命衛隊的威脅顯示出雙方在地緣政治上的對抗加劇。伊朗的油輪運輸在全球能源市場中扮演重要角色，而美國則試圖通過軍事行動來限制伊朗的影響力。此事件發生在特朗普政府尋求與伊朗達成和平協議的背景下，雙方的談判仍然處於不確定狀態。
briefing.analysis: 伊朗革命衛隊的威脅反映出其捍衛國家利益的決心，並可能導致美國在中東的軍事行動進一步升級。美國的空襲行動可能是為了展示其對伊朗行為的強硬立場，但這也可能引發更大範圍的衝突。參考報導提到日本在霍爾木茲海峽的軍事部署，顯示出其他國家對於該地區安全的關注，並可能影響到美國的戰略考量。各方在此事件中的立場差異明顯，伊朗強調報復權利，而美國則強調維護航行自由，未來的發展將取決於雙方的外交互動及軍事行動。

supporting_titles: Japan’s Forgotten Deployment to the Middle East
supporting_summaries: Tokyo should take two-step approach to support safe passage in the Strait of Hormuz, starting by leveraging its existing force in the region.

politics.title: Defence sovereignty: Europe races to build the low-cost weapons of future
politics.summary: With Trump wavering on Nato and war in Ukraine, Europe is scrambling to spend billions on weapons such as drones In a small workshop in England’s East Midlands, engineers at the British startup Skycutter are designing weapons for Ukraine. A row of 3D printers make the fuselage for interceptor drones, while parts such as motors and navigation chips are slotted together by hand. The same process happens hundreds of thousands of times a month in partner Ukrainian factories. The swarms of cheap, deadly and often autonomous drones deployed in that war have already changed combat completely. Troops far behind the frontline must move constantly to avoid attack from the air, travelling along netted tunnels and landscapes crisscrossed by fibre optic cables used to steer drones past radio jamming. Cities are terrorised by guided missiles that are cheaper and therefore more widely used than those that came before. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: With Trump wavering on Nato and war in Ukraine, Europe is scrambling to spend billions on weapons such as drones In a small workshop in England’s East Midlands, engineers at the British startup Skycutter are designing weapons for Ukraine. A row of 3D printers make the fuselage for interceptor drones, while parts such as motors and navigation chips are slotted together by hand. The same process happens hundreds of thousands of times a month in partner Ukrainian factories. The swarms of cheap, deadly and often autonomous drones deployed in that war have already changed combat completely. Troops far behind the frontline must move constantly to avoid attack from the air, travelling along netted tunnels and landscapes crisscrossed by fibre optic cables used to steer drones past radio jamming. Cities are terrorised by guided missiles that are cheaper and therefore more widely used than those that came before. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著特朗普對北約的立場不穩定以及烏克蘭戰爭的持續，歐洲各國正加速投入數十億美元於未來低成本武器的研發。英國初創公司Skycutter的工程師正在設計用於烏克蘭的攔截無人機，並利用3D打印技術生產機身，手工組裝各種零部件。這些便宜且致命的無人機已經在戰場上改變了戰鬥方式，迫使前線後方的部隊不斷移動以避免空中攻擊。
briefing.background: 在烏克蘭戰爭的背景下，歐洲國家面臨著加強國防能力的壓力，特別是在特朗普政府對北約的支持不確定性增加的情況下。這促使歐洲加快武器研發，尤其是無人機等低成本武器的生產。無人機的使用不僅改變了傳統戰爭的模式，也使得各國在軍事技術上的競爭愈加激烈。隨著戰爭的持續，對於高效、便宜的武器系統的需求日益增加，促使相關產業迅速發展。
briefing.analysis: 各國在武器研發上的投入反映了對未來戰爭形態的重新評估。無人機的普及使得傳統軍事力量的運用方式發生了變化，部隊必須適應新的戰鬥環境。英國的Skycutter等初創企業在這一趨勢中扮演了重要角色，通過創新技術來滿足市場需求。然而，這也引發了對於武器擴散及其對平民安全影響的擔憂。各國政府在支持本國防務產業的同時，必須考慮到這些武器的使用可能帶來的倫理和法律問題。未來，隨著技術的進步，無人機的戰術應用將更加多樣化，可能會引發更廣泛的國際軍備競賽。

economy.title: KFC, McDonald’s drive-throughs in China get EV charging, upgraded smart systems
economy.summary: Global fast-food chain KFC is adding more electric vehicle (EV) charging stations and McDonald’s is upgrading digital services, as the fast-food sector turns to digital convenience to draw more customers to drive-through stores amid fierce competition, according to analysts. KFC now operates over 7,000 drive-through restaurants nationwide, including kerbside pickups, according to the first-quarter earnings report of Yum China, operator of KFC and Pizza Hut in mainland China and Hong Kong. The...

briefing.news_focus: Global fast-food chain KFC is adding more electric vehicle (EV) charging stations and McDonald’s is upgrading digital services, as the fast-food sector turns to digital convenience to draw more customers to drive-through stores amid fierce competition, according to analysts. KFC now operates over 7,000 drive-through restaurants nationwide, including kerbside pickups, according to the first-quarter earnings report of Yum China, operator of KFC and Pizza Hut in mainland China and Hong Kong. The...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 全球快餐連鎖品牌KFC在中國擴增電動車充電站，而麥當勞則升級其數位服務，以提升顧客在自取餐廳的便利性，應對激烈的市場競爭。根據百勝中國的第一季度財報，KFC在全國擁有超過7,000家自取餐廳，包括路邊取餐服務，顯示出快餐業者正積極轉向數位化以吸引更多顧客。
briefing.background: 隨著電動車的普及，中國市場對於充電基礎設施的需求日益增加。快餐業者如KFC和麥當勞正面臨來自其他餐飲品牌的激烈競爭，這促使他們必須不斷創新以吸引顧客。KFC和麥當勞的數位化轉型不僅是為了提升顧客體驗，也是為了適應消費者對於便利性和環保的需求。這一趨勢反映了中國快餐市場的變化，並顯示出企業在面對市場挑戰時的靈活應對策略。
briefing.analysis: KFC和麥當勞的策略反映了快餐業者在數位化和環保方面的雙重考量。KFC的充電站設置不僅能吸引電動車車主，也符合當前的環保趨勢，可能會增強品牌形象。而麥當勞的數位服務升級則旨在提升顧客的用餐體驗，進一步增強顧客忠誠度。這些舉措可能會使兩者在競爭中獲得優勢，但也可能引發其他快餐品牌的跟進，進一步加劇市場競爭。參考報導提及的穩定幣話題雖然與主新聞無直接關聯，但也反映了中國在數位化方面的探索，顯示出市場對於新技術的開放態度。

supporting_summaries: But would the country’s leaders really want stablecoins to succeed?

economy.title: Neither US nor Iran can sustain strait of Hormuz standoff indefinitely
economy.summary: Simply hanging on could be a disaster for Iranians, while Trump needs to resolve this economic crisis he created Exchanges of fire between Iran and the US demonstrate the serious instability of the situation in the Middle East. Though the US strikes late on Thursday were just “a love tap”, according to the US president, Donald Trump, the reality is that neither side can continue the high-stakes standoff in the strait of Hormuz indefinitely. The US and its ally Israel demonstrated a comprehensive military superiority over Iran – taking minimal casualties in the 38-day war – but Washington has both failed to translate that into strategic dominance and allowed Iran to take control of the strait, driving up the oil price. Continue reading...

The US and its ally Israel demonstrated a comprehensive military superiority over Iran – taking minimal casualties in the 38-day war – but Washington has both failed to translate that into strategic dominance and allowed Iran to take control of the strait, driving up the oil price. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國與伊朗在霍爾木茲海峽的緊張局勢持續升級，雙方的交火顯示出中東地區的嚴重不穩定。儘管美國總統特朗普形容最近的空襲為「輕微的打擊」，但事實上，雙方都無法長期維持這種高風險的對峙。美國及其盟友以色列在38天的戰爭中展現出對伊朗的軍事優勢，但未能轉化為戰略上的主導地位，反而讓伊朗控制了霍爾木茲海峽，導致油價上漲。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，任何在此地區的衝突都可能影響全球油價。美國與伊朗的緊張關係源於多年的地緣政治衝突，特別是在特朗普政府期間，對伊朗的制裁政策加劇了雙方的對立。伊朗在地區內的影響力增強，使其在戰略上能夠對美國的行動進行反制。隨著局勢的惡化，全球市場對於油價的波動反應敏感，這使得各方都面臨著經濟壓力。
briefing.analysis: 在這場對峙中，美國與伊朗的利益交織複雜。美國希望通過軍事優勢來維持對地區的控制，但面臨著經濟壓力，特朗普需要解決由此引發的經濟危機。另一方面，伊朗則試圖利用其在霍爾木茲海峽的控制權來增強其談判籌碼。參考報導中提到的油價上漲，顯示出市場對於這一局勢的敏感反應，可能進一步影響全球經濟。不同報導的重點在於，BBC強調了特朗普對停火的表態，而Nikkei Asia則指出了全球航運的脆弱性，這可能暗示著更廣泛的經濟影響。

economy.title: Spiritless summer: Americans feel squeeze of costly fuel amid busy travel season
economy.summary: Soaring oil prices have left many Americans with higher costs and fewer options for travel amid the Iran war Tell us: have your holiday plans changed in light of recent world events? Chelsea Blackmore saves up every year for an annual vacation with her 58-year-old mother. This year, after landing an especially good deal, they made plans to embark on a Disney cruise from Orlando. To keep costs low, she bought the least expensive plane tickets she could find: a $500 round trip fare on Spirit Airlines. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Soaring oil prices have left many Americans with higher costs and fewer options for travel amid the Iran war Tell us: have your holiday plans changed in light of recent world events? Chelsea Blackmore saves up every year for an annual vacation with her 58-year-old mother. This year, after landing an especially good deal, they made plans to embark on a Disney cruise from Orlando. To keep costs low, she bought the least expensive plane tickets she could find: a $500 round trip fare on Spirit Airlines. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著油價飆升，美國人在繁忙的旅遊季節中感受到燃料成本上升的壓力，導致旅行選擇減少。報導提到，許多家庭的度假計劃受到影響，例如切爾西·布萊克莫爾（Chelsea Blackmore）與母親的迪士尼郵輪計劃，雖然她努力尋找便宜的機票，但仍面臨高昂的旅行成本。
briefing.background: 近期，由於伊朗戰爭的影響，油價急劇上升，這使得美國民眾在旅行時面臨更高的燃料費用。根據《經濟學人》的報導，這場戰爭可能引發多年的最大油價衝擊，並且油價可能會持續高企。這一情況對於依賴汽油的旅行業和消費者的財務狀況造成了壓力，尤其是在夏季旅遊高峰期，許多家庭的度假計劃因此受到影響。
briefing.analysis: 在這一背景下，各方的利益關係變得更加複雜。美國消費者面臨高油價的直接影響，這可能導致他們減少旅行或選擇更便宜的選項，進而影響航空公司和旅遊業的收益。參考報導1提到美國和伊朗之間可能達成協議的消息，這可能會對油價產生積極影響，從而改善消費者的旅行選擇。然而，《經濟學人》則警告，油價可能仍將保持高位，這使得未來的旅行計劃仍然充滿不確定性。這種情況下，消費者的信心和支出模式將成為關鍵觀察指標。
